events.label: assistant
events.text:
I've written the diagnosis to `/app/answer.json`. 

Summary: The observed condition — parasitic draw test steps performed out of the OEM-specified order — invalidates the diagnostic result rather than pointing to a confirmed failed component. Breaking the circuit to insert an ammeter (or measuring before modules reach sleep mode) re-wakes control modules and resets their sleep timers, producing an artificially inflated draw reading. I flagged this as `fail` (non-compliant procedure), medium risk, and specified the correct step order (verify accessories off → wait for module sleep → connect ammeter/inductive clamp without opening the circuit → record stable baseline → sequential fuse pull to isolate) along with corrective actions to redo the test properly before condemning any circuit or component.
